name: Primavera Contadina- Dalla Casa Buitoni
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Green or yellow bell pepper
1 package CONTADINA Refrigerated Sliced ripe olives (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add onion and garlic; sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
3. Add zucchini, yellow squash, and bell pepper strips; sauté for an additional 3-4 minutes until vegetables are tender but still crisp.
4. Stir in reserved tomato juice from the CONTADINA sauce, Italian style paste, warm water, salt (if using), and pepper.
5. Simmer the mixture for 5-8 minutes, or until all vegetables are cooked through.
6. Add diced tomatoes and chopped fresh basil; continue to simmer for an additional minute.
7. Cook pasta according to package directions.
8. Drain the pasta and pour sauce over it.
9. Garnish with sliced ripe olives and fresh basil if desired.
10. Serve and enjoy! This recipe makes 6 servings, with each serving containing approximately 220 calories, 5 grams of fat, 50 milligrams of cholesterol, 580 milligrams of sodium, and 8 grams of protein.
